creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 239414
Patch file

* Update to 2.2.0.
* Build of all updated ports succeeds with poudriere and 13.1-RELEASE amd64 jail.
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-acme test` is '248 passed'.
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-certbot test` is '979 passed, 28 skipped'.

ChangeLog:      https://github.com/certbot/certbot/releases/tag/v2.2.0
